name: summarize_record
description: Summarize one CRM record (client, investor, mandate, transaction, engagement, or partner) into a structured internal briefing with a deep link.

recordType.description: Which kind of CRM record to summarize

query.description: The record's name as the user said it, or an exact record id from a previous candidates list

focus.description: Optional angle to weight the briefing toward, e.g. 'risks' or 'next steps'
